solutions.solution: (D) As, COMPUTE is coded as follows: 3 15 13 16 21 20 5 → 6 19 22 15 14 14 4, using pattern +1, -1, +1, -1, +1. Similarly, RETAINS → TOJBSDO using same pattern.
(C) As, NONE → LQLG using pattern -2, +2, -2, +2. Similarly, LAMB → JCKD using same pattern.
(D) As, FAME → GGSY using pattern +6, +6, -6, -6. Similarly, LION → ROIH using same pattern.
(C) As, RELATED → EFUBKDO using pattern +1, -1, +1, -1, +1, -1. Similarly, RETAINS → TOJBSDO using same pattern.
(D) As, TOMB → GOAL using pattern shown in the diagram. Similarly, GOAL → ALOE using same pattern.
(C) As, MIKE → HCPF using pattern +1, +2, +3, +4, +5, +6, +7. Similarly, GAMBLE → HCPFOK using same pattern.
(C) As, BALK → RFFK using pattern -1, +1, -1, +2, -1, +2. Similarly, SELDOM → RFKFNO using same pattern.
(C) As, BISLER → CHTKFQJ and AQUA → BPVZ using pattern +1, -1, +1, -1, +1, -1, +1, -1. Similarly, KINGFISHER → LHOFGHTGFQ using same pattern.
